examples: A new type of oil - soluble imidazole corrosion delay agent has been Synthesized from naphthene acid and organic amine.
It is formulated a rust - proof oil to low noise bearings with naphthene base oil which has good rust - proof property.
The content of naphthene, total paraffin, olefin and aromatics in FCC gasoline increased or decreased alternately with the change of space velocity.
